'''dachogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:svgs|svgs]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:svgs|svgs]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dachogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæchegeth|dæchegeth]] || [[word:dæchegej|dæchegej]] || [[word:dæchegesh|dæchegesh]] || [[word:dæchege|dæchege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dachochogoth|dachochogoth]] || [[word:dachochogoj|dachochogoj]] || [[word:dachochogosh|dachochogosh]] || [[word:dachochogo|dachochogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dachogoth|dachogoth]] || [[word:dachogoj|dachogoj]] || [[word:dachogosh|dachogosh]] || [[word:dachogo|dachogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dachofgoth|dachofgoth]] || [[word:dachofgoj|dachofgoj]] || [[word:dachofgosh|dachofgosh]] || [[word:dachofgof|dachofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dachogotho|dachogotho]] || [[word:dachogojo|dachogojo]] || [[word:dachogosho|dachogosho]] || [[word:dachogoko|dachogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dachogoth|dachogoth]] || [[word:dachogoj|dachogoj]] || [[word:dachogosh|dachogosh]] || [[word:dachogo|dachogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dachogothol|dachogothol]] || [[word:dachogojol|dachogojol]] || [[word:dachogoshol|dachogoshol]] || [[word:dachogokol|dachogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dachogothotho|dachogothotho]] || [[word:dachogojojo|dachogojojo]] || [[word:dachogoshosho|dachogoshosho]] || [[word:dachogoko|dachogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dachogothon|dachogothon]] || [[word:dachogojon|dachogojon]] || [[word:dachogoshon|dachogoshon]] || [[word:dachogokon|dachogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dachogothoro|dachogothoro]] || [[word:dachogojoro|dachogojoro]] || [[word:dachogoshoro|dachogoshoro]] || [[word:dachogokoro|dachogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
